'''Keiran Halcyon''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] roughly [[400 BBY/Legends|four hundred years]] before the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the start of the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]].

==Biography==
Discovered to be [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] and inducted into the [[Jedi academy|academy]] of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], Keiran Halcyon eventually passed his [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knighthood]] and was made a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] by the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]]. Pursuing independent study along the path of the [[Jedi Guardian/Legends|Jedi Guardian]], Halcyon became a noted [[Corellian Jedi]], taking on several missions that related to safeguarding his [[Corellian system/Legends|home system]]. One such accomplishment was the halting of the notorious and destructive [[Selonian/Legends|Selonian]] [[Afarathu]] cult in [[380 BBY/Legends|380 BBY]]. While designing his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], Halcyon imbued the weapon with a [[Durindfire (crystal)|Durindfire]] gem, which gave his blade a unique silver color. Additionally, using Jedi techniques stored deep in the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple's]] [[Jedi Archives/Legends|Archives]], Halcyon was able to produce a lightsaber blade that could extend up to 3 meters in length.<ref name="IJ" />

Long after Halcyon's death, his bloodline produced at least two more Jedi, the famed [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Nejaa Halcyon]] who served bravely during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], and [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]]. Horn was born into a time of conflict in the galaxy, when the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]] [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|outlawed]] [[Jedi training/Legends|Jedi training]] and strove to eliminate the Order's history from galactic records. However, as the Galactic Empire was overthrown and the Jedi Order [[New Jedi Order|rose from the ashes]], Horn joined the fledgling Order under the name of his ancestor, Keiran Halcyon. Studying under [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] at the [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] [[Jedi Praxeum]], Horn eventually dropped the alias and went onto to become a prominent member of the [[Jedi High Council (New Jedi Order)|Jedi High Council]].<ref name="Fate of the Jedi: Omen">''[[Fate of the Jedi: Omen]]''</ref>

==Personality and traits==
Keiran Halcyon was fluent in [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]], [[Huttese/Legends|Huttese]], and [[Rodese/Legends|Rodese]].<ref name="JATM">''[[Jedi Academy Training Manual]]''</ref>

==Powers and abilities==
While strong in [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], the [[Horn family|Halcyon bloodline]] was known to be weak in [[Telekinesis/Legends|telekinetic]] [[Force power/Legends|abilities]], one of the abilities that Jedi were widely known for. However, instead of being weakened by this seeming impediment, those of the Halcyon family that became Jedi enhanced their gifts of [[Mind trick/Legends#Force illusion|alter mind]] to give them advantages where other Jedi might be weaker.<ref name="IJ" /> Keiran Halcyon was also skilled with the ability to [[Tutaminis|absorb energy]].<ref name="JATM" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ''[[Jedi Academy Training Manual]]'' mistakenly states that Keiran lived in the same era as [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], and was even his student for a brief time, while he in fact lived 400 years prior to Luke Skywalker's birth. This error is due to a retcon from the book ''[[I, Jedi]]'', where it is revealed that the Keiran Halcyon that appeared in the Jedi Academy Trilogy was actually [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]], a distant descendant of the original Halcyon. Horn used the alias upon Skywalker's suggestion, so that it would not become public knowledge that he was training as a Jedi.
